lessons.title: Family Types and Structures
objectives: Identify different types of families in the Caribbean
Describe the characteristics of each family type
lessons.experiment: Family Tree Builder: Drag and drop family members to create different family structures and see how they are defined.

lessons.title: Roles and Responsibilities
objectives: Examine the roles of family members
Understand the importance of responsible parenthood
lessons.experiment: Role Assigner: Match various family tasks and responsibilities to different family members in a virtual household scenario.

lessons.title: Primary and Secondary Groups
objectives: Distinguish between primary and secondary groups
Understand the characteristics of groups
lessons.experiment: Group Sorter: Categorize different social gatherings (e.g., a family dinner vs. a business meeting) into primary or secondary groups.

lessons.title: Social Institutions
objectives: Identify major social institutions
Understand their functions in society
lessons.experiment: Institution Matcher: Link social needs (e.g., 'spiritual guidance', 'learning skills') to the corresponding social institution.

lessons.title: Systems of Government
objectives: Compare different systems of government in the Caribbean
Understand the democratic process
lessons.experiment: Election Day Simulation: Act as a voter or a candidate, understanding the process of casting ballots and how constituencies work.

lessons.title: The Branches of Government
objectives: Identify the three branches of government
Explain the principle of separation of powers
lessons.experiment: Laws and Gavel: Trace a law from its proposal in parliament to its enforcement and interpretation by the courts.

lessons.title: CARICOM and Its Objectives
objectives: Explain the purpose of CARICOM
Identify the member states
lessons.experiment: Caribbean Map Quiz: Drag and drop Caribbean country flags to their correct locations and identify which are CARICOM members.

lessons.title: Benefits and Challenges
objectives: Discuss the benefits of regional integration
Identify challenges to integration
lessons.experiment: Trade Route Game: Move goods between Caribbean islands and see how removing trade barriers affects the speed and cost.

lessons.title: Population Distribution and Growth
objectives: Understand factors affecting population distribution
Calculate birth and death rates
lessons.experiment: Population Pyramid Builder: Adjust birth and death rates to see how they change the shape of a country's population pyramid over time.

lessons.title: Migration
objectives: Identify types of migration
Analyze the push and pull factors
lessons.experiment: Push-Pull Magnet: Drag various factors (e.g., 'better jobs', 'natural disasters') to either the 'Push' or 'Pull' category for a virtual migrant.

lessons.title: Forms of Communication
objectives: Distinguish between different forms of communication
Understand the impact of technology
lessons.experiment: Message Relay: Send a message through various mediums (letter, phone, internet) and compare the speed, cost, and reach.

lessons.title: Consumer Rights and Responsibilities
objectives: Identify consumer rights
Understand the role of consumer protection agencies
lessons.experiment: Smart Shopper Challenge: Evaluate different product labels and contracts to identify misleading information and exercise consumer rights.
